ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, citizen scientist) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_types" (
  "observation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the observation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the observation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the observation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_type_id")
)
column_names: Name of the role (e.g., researcher, citizen scientist)
Unique identifier for the observation type
